headline: Coinbase’s Political Push And Crypto Mortgages Reshape Investor Risk View
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) backed advocacy group Stand With Crypto is stepping up its political activity as U.S. lawmakers debate key crypto legislation. At the same time, Coinbase is entering the crypto mortgage market through a partnership that allows homebuyers to post Bitcoin and USDC as collateral. The mortgage offering is tied to federally supported loans through Better Home & Finance, linking digital assets to traditional housing finance products. For you as an investor, this...

headline: Coinbase Rises 3%, Bitmine Jumps 4%: Is the Crypto Rally Back?
summary: Coinbase Global (NASDAQ:COIN) stock is up 3% in Monday morning trading, while Bitmine Immersion Technologies (NYSE:BMNR) stock is climbing roughly 4% to kick off the week of March 30. Both stocks are bouncing off recent lows, and the simultaneous move is drawing attention from crypto watchers wondering if the worst of this downturn is behind ... Coinbase Rises 3%, Bitmine Jumps 4%: Is the Crypto Rally Back?
